text.title: Verb-Object Tool Naming with Namespace Prefix Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the verb-object-tool-naming methodology end-to-end.

step.name: ingest-catalog
step.action: Enumerate every tool; tokenize the name; capture provenance (which server / SDK).

step.name: score-each-name
step.action: For each tool, score 0/1 on verb_object / snake_case / namespaced (when multi-server) / token_count_ok / schema_aligned. Verdict = ok (5/5), rename (≤4/5), split (verb hides multiple actions).

step.name: propose-renames
step.action: For each `rename` verdict, propose new name following verb_object + namespace.
step.decision-gate: If > 30% of catalog needs rename, escalate to a catalog redesign before per-tool renames.

step.name: run-ab-rename
step.input: Eval set of 50+ tasks + audit JSON + agent trace store
step.action: For each rename: deploy to staging, run eval, capture tool-selection error rate. Keep the rename only if error rate drops.

step.name: merge-and-monitor
step.input: Renames passing the A/B + production catalog
step.action: Merge renames in a single PR (lower review noise). Wire a weekly job that re-scores the catalog and alerts on regressions.
step.output: Production catalog updated; selection-error dashboard live.
